summary: book command: quote + assemble a booking, then hand payment off to the browser under --confirm. Never calls createBooking.
reason: createBooking requires a Braintree-minted nonce + deviceData + 3-D Secure that can only be produced in a browser; headless booking is impossible by design, so payment stays human-driven in the browser.
validated_outcome: book prints plan + real price; opens checkout only with --confirm; short-circuits under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY.
